use_cases: Primary site navigation and branding placement for SaaS applications
Responsive header with action buttons for user interactions
Consistent navigation across desktop and mobile views
Authentication and CTA buttons integrated in header
Dark mode compatible navigation with gradient hover effects
ai_summary: A responsive navigation header component featuring variant-based buttons with Radix UI Slot integration and class-variance-authority styling. Supports multiple button variants including a gradient 'cool' style with dark mode inset shadows, focus states, and hover brightness effects. Designed for cross-platform use with desktop and mobile compatibility, commonly used in SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
